title: AI Authoring Session Contract v1
description: Contract describing a single AI authoring session, binding agent identity, target repo, and allowed file operations to invariant-governed file kinds and naming patterns.

id.description: Stable identifier for this authoring session contract.

objectKind.description: Object kind for routing and analytics.

tier.description: Entitlement tier for this authoring session.

targetRepo.description: Repository this session is allowed to touch (e.g., 'HorrorPlace-Constellation-Contracts').

policyProfileId.description: Optional authoring policy profile that constrains intensity, tiers, or invariants.

fileTypeInvariantsRef.description: Reference to the file-type invariants document governing this session (e.g., 'file-type-invariants.core.v1').

allowedOperations.description: Allowed file-level operations for this session.

allowedFileKinds.description: Subset of fileKinds from file-type-invariants that this session may create or modify.

maxFilesPerSession.description: Hard cap on files that may be created or modified in this session.

maxLinesPerFile.description: Soft cap on lines per generated file to avoid large, under-reviewed diffs.

targets.description: Explicit file targets this session is allowed to generate or update, each bound to a fileKind, objectKind, and naming pattern key.

fileKind.description: Declared file kind; must be one of the fileKinds defined in file-type invariants.

objectKind.description: Object kind this file will host (e.g., 'dungeonRunContract', 'surpriseMechanicContract').

patternKey.description: Identifier or alias that maps to a namingPatterns entry in the file-type invariants document.

targetPath.description: Concrete repo-relative path the AI is allowed to touch (must unify with the resolved naming pattern).

requiresExistingFile.description: If true, the targetPath must already exist; used to block silent renames disguised as updates.

requireStableFileId.description: If true, the file must contain a stable fileId field that remains unchanged across edits.

intensityConstraints.description: Optional caps on horror intensity for authoring, to keep AI-authored content within safe bands.

maxIntensityBand.description: Maximum allowed intensity band for any contract touched in this session.

forbidAdultBand.description: If true, contracts or specs with 'adult' intensity are forbidden.

invariantConstraints.description: Optional invariant and metric caps to keep generated contracts inside policy envelopes.

maxDET.description: Maximum DET cap allowed in any generated or modified contract.

maxCDL.description: Maximum CDL band upper bound allowed in generated or modified contracts.

minARR.description: Minimum ARR band lower bound required for generated or modified contracts.

sessionNotes.description: Human-readable notes about the session’s intent and scope.
